metadata.description: Delivery format rules — powder jar architecture. Prebiotics + heavy botanicals go in powder jar. Vitamins + minerals + light botanicals stack into pooled morning capsules via CapsuleStackingOptimizer. Bitter botanicals + sleep aids go in pooled evening capsules.
breaking_changes_from_v2: Sachet removed — replaced by powder_jar (prebiotics + heavy botanicals) and pooled_morning_capsules (vitamins + minerals + light botanicals)
Evening capsule 1/2 split logic removed — replaced by CapsuleStackingOptimizer on pooled_evening_capsules

hard_capsule_probiotic.label: Probiotic Capsule
hard_capsule_probiotic.description: Probiotic strains in vegetarian hard capsule. Fixed count = 1. Never stacked.

softgel.label: Omega + Antioxidant Softgel
softgel.description: FIXED composition — everyone who needs any component gets the whole softgel
softgel.note: Pre-mixed softgel. Cannot add/remove individual components.

magnesium_capsule.label: Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsule
magnesium_capsule.timing_note: Magnesium is ALWAYS evening (1-2h before bed). Only dosing (1 vs 2 capsules) varies.
magnesium_capsule.description: Magnesium bisglycinate for sleep, sport recovery, and stress

sleep.description: Sleep quality ≤7/10 OR sleep improvement is a stated goal

sport.description: Regular exercise (moderate+) or active sport goals

stress.description: Stress ≥6/10 OR stress/mood is a stated goal

magnesium_capsule.exclusivity: Only Mg delivery — no Mg in jar or other capsules

powder_jar.label: Prebiotic & Botanical Powder Jar
powder_jar.daily_target_note: Soft limit — aim for ≤19g/day. Not a hard manufacturing cap. Warn if exceeded; trim lowest-priority botanicals first.
powder_jar.mixing_instructions: Mix in 200-300ml water (a large glass). Stir well and drink immediately.
powder_jar.heavy_botanical_note: A botanical is routed to the jar when its dose_mg > heavy_botanical_threshold_mg (650mg). Below this threshold, the botanical is eligible for the pooled morning capsule instead.
powder_jar.description: Powder jar for prebiotics + heavy non-bitter botanicals. Phased dosing applies to the full jar content.

pooled_morning_capsules.label: Morning Wellness Capsule
pooled_morning_capsules.light_supplement_note: An ingredient goes here when: (a) it is not capsule_only (not bitter/pungent), AND (b) its dose_mg ≤ heavy_botanical_threshold_mg (650mg), AND (c) it is not handled by a fixed unit (no Mg, no Omega, no probiotics). Vitamins and minerals always go here regardless of dose (they are always ≤650mg individually).
pooled_morning_capsules.description: Vitamins, minerals, and light non-bitter botanicals pooled and stacked into the minimum number of 650mg capsules via CapsuleStackingOptimizer. Count varies per client (typically 1-4 capsules).

pooled_evening_capsules.label: Evening Wellness Capsule
pooled_evening_capsules.description: Sleep aids, calming adaptogens (Ashwagandha, Valerian, L-Theanine, Melatonin, Propolis, Quercetin) pooled and stacked into the minimum number of 650mg evening capsules via CapsuleStackingOptimizer.

polyphenol_dedicated_capsule.label: Morning Wellness Capsule
polyphenol_dedicated_capsule.description: Dedicated capsule for Tier 2 polyphenols (Curcumin+Piperine or Bergamot) that are too large to share with other capsules.

heavy_botanical_threshold_note: Non-bitter, non-capsule-only botanical supplements with dose > this threshold go to the powder jar. At or below this threshold they go to the pooled morning capsules. This single constant governs the routing decision — do not hardcode 650 in Python code, read it from this KB.

phased_dosing_policy.rationale: Dietary fibers increase intestinal gas and bloating as the gut microbiota adapts to the new substrate supply. This is an expected and necessary side effect of microbiome remodelling — it indicates that the prebiotic fibers are being fermented by bacteria. Starting at half the recommended dose for the first two weeks allows the gut to acclimate gradually, significantly reducing discomfort without compromising the therapeutic outcome. From week 3, the full dose is taken.
phased_dosing_policy.instruction_template: Weeks 1–2: Mix {half_dose_g}g in a large glass of water daily. From week 3 onwards: increase to the full {full_dose_g}g daily dose.
phased_dosing_policy.applies_to_entire_jar_note: Phased dosing applies to the complete jar mixture — both prebiotics AND non-bitter botanicals included in the jar. The half-dose instruction applies to the full jar content, not just the prebiotic portion.

capsule_stacking_optimizer.description: Algorithm that pools eligible ingredients, finds the minimum capsule count via dose adjustment within KB-defined ranges.

algorithm.step_1: Sum target doses of all pooled components → total_pooled_mg
algorithm.step_3: Try floor(raw_capsule_count) capsules first (minimize capsule count)
algorithm.step_6: If overflow ≤ 0: done (fits in floor_count capsules)
algorithm.step_7: If overflow > 0: iterate adjustable ingredients largest-first, reduce within [min_dose_mg, max_dose_mg] to eliminate overflow
algorithm.step_8: If overflow eliminated: use floor_count. Else: use ceil_count (= floor_count + 1)
algorithm.step_9: Return capsule_count, adjusted components, full adjustment_record

ingredient_requirements.adjustable_ingredients: min_dose_mg < dose_mg ≤ max_dose_mg (adjustable=true) — can be reduced to min

unit_count_limits.note: Preferred max = 9 (standard cases, +3 from previous baseline of 6). Absolute max = 13 (individual cases, +5 from baseline). LLM supplement selection is informed of these limits. The CapsuleStackingOptimizer respects these limits and alerts if exceeded.

assignment_rules.rule: All probiotics go in the probiotic hard capsule. If total weight >650mg, redistribute CFU.
FIXED softgel composition. Not customizable per client.
Vitamin D and E are already in fixed softgel. NO additional doses elsewhere.
Magnesium ONLY in bisglycinate capsule (evening). Never in jar or other capsules. 1 or 2 capsules based on need scoring.
All prebiotics and prebiotic-like fibers go in the powder jar.
Non-bitter botanicals with dose_mg > heavy_botanical_threshold_mg (650mg) go in the powder jar.
B-complex, Vitamin C, folate, B12, etc. go in pooled morning capsules (subject to CapsuleStackingOptimizer).
Iron, Zinc, Calcium, etc. go in pooled morning capsules (subject to CapsuleStackingOptimizer).
Non-bitter botanicals with dose_mg ≤ heavy_botanical_threshold_mg (650mg) go in pooled morning capsules. Examples: Glutathione, Banaba, Guarana, Panax Ginseng, GLA, Amla.
L-Theanine, Melatonin, Valerian go in pooled evening capsules (subject to CapsuleStackingOptimizer).
Capsule-only calming adaptogens (Ashwagandha, Propolis, Quercetin) go in pooled evening capsules.
Curcumin+Piperine and Bergamot get a dedicated morning capsule (too large to share).

softgel.formula: FIXED at ~750mg per softgel — no calculation needed

magnesium_capsule.formula: FIXED at 750mg per capsule — no calculation needed

powder_jar.action_if_exceeded: warn + trim lowest-priority heavy botanicals first; never trim prebiotics

capsule_only_substances.description: Substances that must remain in capsule form due to bitter/pungent taste, stability, or bioavailability. These always go to evening capsule (calming) or polyphenol capsule (Tier 2) — never to the jar.
capsule_only_substances.reason: Bitter, pungent, or resinous taste makes jar/water dissolution unpalatable. Must be encapsulated.

polyphenol_delivery_classification.description: Polyphenol-specific delivery routing. Polyphenols are bitter/irritating and need capsule delivery, except sachet-safe ones (now routed to jar as they are non-bitter).

capsule_only_tier_1.description: Bitter polyphenols that go in pooled evening capsules (CapsuleStackingOptimizer handles capacity)

capsule_only_tier_2.description: Large polyphenols that need their own dedicated morning capsule (too big to share)

piperine_rule.description: Piperine MUST be added at 1:100 ratio. Enforced deterministically in Stage D.1c.

jar_safe.description: Mild-tasting polyphenols that go in the powder jar (previously called sachet_safe)

apple_polyphenol_extract.note: Up to 1200mg safe in 12-week studies, 600mg for long-term.

jar_safe.budget_rule: Remaining polyphenol budget = 1000mg - total_capsule_polyphenols. If budget is 0, no jar polyphenols.
